title: Sherman's Vanilla-Plus RPG
description: A vanilla-esque RPG that uses LevelZ as its main progression engine.
body:
This modpack is designed as a vanilla-like RPG experience, keeping the core gameplay intact while adding RPG elements and quality-of-life improvements. It includes over 100 mods that enhance exploration, combat, crafting, and progression. The modlist focuses on practical features like new weapons, armor, skills, and structures, alongside optimizations for smoother performance.

**Key features include:**  
🟥 Leveling mechanics from LevelZ  
🟧 Specialized RPG class mods such as Archers, Wizards, Paladins & Priests, Rogues & Warriors, and Death Knights  
🟨 Overhauled terrain with WWOO, BetterEnd, and BetterNether  
🟩 Tons of new depth with Bewitchment, Create, Deeper and Darker, Better Archeology, and the Let's Do series  
🟦 Artifacts, Jewelry, Immersive Armors, and Marium’s Soulslike Weaponry, adding tons of new gear  
🟪 Expanded combat mechanics with Better Combat and Combat Roll.  
🟫 Tons of new performance and QOL enhancements  

The modpack prioritizes simplicity over complex tech trees or drastic overhauls like those found in more tech-focused modpacks, making it ideal for players wanting a twist on classic Minecraft survival while still getting to experience a lot of new content. 

The RPG mechanics slowly ease the player into more complicated systems, instead of giving the player absolute freedom to try impossible or confusing things as soon as they spawn in.
